title: SQL: copy into does not detect syntax errors
poc:
CREATE TABLE my_test (
   col1  INT,
   col2  INT,
   col3  INT,
   col4  VARCHAR(1),
   col5  VARCHAR(1)
  ) ;
key_bug_features: copy into does not detect syntax errors
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE my_test (col1 INT, col2 INT, col3 INT, col4 VARCHAR(1), col5 VARCHAR(1));
INSERT INTO my_test (col1, col2, col3, col4, col5) VALUES (1, 2, 3, 'A', 'B');
INSERT INTO my_test (col1, col2, col3, col4, col5) VALUES (NULL, 5, 6, 'C', NULL);
SELECT col1, col2, (col3 + 10) AS col3_plus_ten FROM my_test WHERE col4 IS NOT NULL;
COPY INTO my_test FROM '/path/to/data.csv' WITH DELIMITER ',';
